subject_line: Your reps are spending 3 hours a day on research
body:
Hi {first_name},

Most SDR managers I talk to say the same thing: their reps spend more time building lists than actually selling.

We built something that handles the research and first-touch automatically — so your team can focus on conversations, not spreadsheets.

Worth a 15-minute look?
target_persona_reasoning: Leads with the operational pain. Best fit for SDR managers, startup operators, and founder-sellers who feel the time cost directly.

subject_line: How one team booked 40% more meetings with the same headcount
body:
Hi {first_name},

A Series A SaaS company with 4 SDRs went from 18 to 26 meetings booked per month — without hiring anyone.

They automated the research and list-building step that was eating 2+ hours per rep per day.

Happy to share the specifics if it's relevant to what you're working on.
target_persona_reasoning: Opens with a concrete business outcome. Best fit for VP Sales, RevOps, and CFOs who evaluate decisions through pipeline and ROI metrics.

subject_line: Quick question about your outbound stack
body:
Hi {first_name},

I noticed your team does a lot of outbound. Curious — how long does it take your reps to build a list of 50 qualified prospects right now?

Asking because we just released something that cuts that down to under 10 minutes. Might be worth a quick conversation.
target_persona_reasoning: Low-friction opener. No pitch, just curiosity. Works as a pattern interrupt across all persona types but especially effective with busy operators who delete long cold emails.
